# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cloud monitoring and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

# ARM Template for Azure Web App, SQL Database and Storage Account 
parameters:
- name: appNamePrefix # prefix to use in resource names (e.g., 'prod')  
  type: string   
  default: prod    
resources:     
- name: storageAccounts      
  type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts       
  properties:         
  - location: [resourceGroup().location]          
  - accountTier: Standard_LRS        
  
# SQL Database and App Service   
- name: appServicePlan     # Azure Function to host the web apps     
type: Microsoft.Web/serverfarms      
properties:         
name: ${concat(parameters('appNamePrefix'), '-appserviceplan')}          
sku: S1        
location: [resourceGroup().location] 
  
- name: appService     # Azure Function to host the web apps     
type: Microsoft.Web/sites      
properties:         
name: ${concat(parameters('appNamePrefix'), '-web')}          
location: 'West Europe'        
sku: S1           
tags: 
- name : project   # tag to identify the resource group in Azure Monitor logs   
  value: webapps     
dependsOn: [storageAccounts]    
properties:         
defaultDocument: index.html          
reservedConnectionStringsCount: '0'        
siteConfig:       
- appScaleLimit: None           
scaleUnits: S1            
location: West Europe  # location of the storage account   
connectionStringType: Connection Strings    
  
# Diagnostic settings and monitoring for Azure Web App, SQL Database & Storage Accounts.     
- name: diagnosticSetting      
type: Microsoft.Insights/diagnosticSettings       
properties:         
logs:         # Log categories to collect logs from the web app   
  - category: ApplicationLog          
    retentionPolicy: None           
  
# Monitoring for Azure Web App, SQL Database & Storage Accounts     
- name: monitor      
type: Microsoft.Insights/monitors       
properties:         
name: ${concat(parameters('appNamePrefix'), '-monitor')}          
resourceUri: /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}            # replace with your subscription id and resource group name 
metricTrigger:     
- metricName: CpuPercentage         
    operator: GreaterThan        
    threshold: '80'          
  
# Monitoring for Azure SQL Database & Storage Accounts.    
monitorSqlDatabase_v2 :       # replace with your sql database name and resource group 
type: Microsoft.Insights/metricPacks       
properties:         
resourceUri:/subscriptions/{SubscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{ResourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/servers/{ServerName}          
metrics:        
- resource: ${concat(parameters('appNamePrefix'), '-web')}            # replace with your web app name 
    category: CustomMetrics         
    metricName: CpuPercentage
